author: GrishaKhumaryan
name: GrishaKhumaryan - BigramHash4096 MuonEqR SDClip ScoreFirstTTT 3LayerRecurrence (Mean of 3 Seeds)
blurb: Mean of 3 seeds (1337, 42, 2025).
